hypothesis: If the o4-mini model with one-shot prompting using the most complex in-context example yields higher structural and parametric extraction performance (precision, recall, F1) and collection rate for PROV-DM synthesis-procedure graphs from 1,616 papers than GPT-4.1 mini, GPT-4.1, and zero-shot prompting, then this configuration is more effective at automatically extracting synthesis procedures from scientific literature.
